services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Integrated design solutions for all your architectural needs

architectural.name: Architectural Design
architectural.desc: Creative architectural designs that blend beauty and function, considering the surrounding environment.
architectural.details: We provide comprehensive designs from initial concepts to full execution drawings, with attention to every detail.

interior.name: Interior Design
interior.desc: Interior designs that reflect your personality and transform your space into an ideal living environment.
interior.details: We specialize in selecting materials, colors, and furniture to create comfortable, elegant atmospheres tailored to your taste.

exterior.name: Exterior Design
exterior.desc: Distinctive architectural facades that give your building an exceptional character.
exterior.details: From structural systems to exterior materials and lighting, we ensure integrated and harmonious design.

supervision.name: Executive Supervision
supervision.desc: Professional specialized supervision ensuring your project is executed to the highest quality standards.
supervision.details: Our team monitors every phase of construction to ensure contractors adhere to designs and specifications.

rendering.name: 3D Visualization
rendering.desc: Realistic 3D visualizations giving you a clear view of your project before execution.
rendering.details: We use the latest 3D rendering and VR technologies to provide an immersive experience of your project.

consulting.name: Architectural Consulting
consulting.desc: Specialized consultations to help you make the right architectural decisions.
consulting.details: Whether building, renovating, or planning, our consultations ensure you save time and money.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A journey of architectural passion toward excellence and innovation
about.bio_text: A specialized architect with over 10 years of experience in designing residential, commercial, and hospitality projects. A graduate of the Faculty of Architecture at Damascus University, he founded Sardini Studio with a clear vision: merging Arab heritage with global modernity to create exceptional spaces that endure.
about.philosophy_text: We believe every project is a unique story deserving to be told in a distinctive architectural language. We design for people first, with deep respect for the environment and local cultural identity.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: A clear and transparent methodology from the first meeting to final delivery

step1.title: Initial Consultation
step1.desc: We listen to your vision and goals and fully understand your needs

step2.title: Conceptual Design
step2.desc: We develop creative ideas and present multiple design proposals

step3.title: 3D Visualization
step3.desc: We transform the design into a realistic, detailed 3D visualization

step4.title: Execution Drawings
step4.desc: We prepare precise engineering drawings for all execution phases

step5.title: Site Supervision
step5.desc: We oversee execution and monitor every detail with precision

step6.title: Final Delivery
step6.desc: We deliver an integrated project that exceeds your expectations
